description: Conservative, production-safe starting presets for cross-engine comparison on Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct.

vllm.description: Preserve the current stable vLLM path while avoiding extra speculative or aggressive queue tuning.

sglang.description: Keep SGLang close to stock behavior with only explicit memory and context sizing for comparability.

tensorrt_llm.description: Assumes a TensorRT-LLM-compatible model or engine artifact path is already available; keep batch sizing mostly default.
assumptions: The worker image includes tensorrt_llm and compatible CUDA dependencies.
The provisioned model path points to a TensorRT-LLM-compatible engine or buildable artifact.
